raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "personal commitment to intellectual humility and balanced inquiry",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "all-or-nothing frames are recognizable and avoidable",
    "partial truth exists on both sides of polarized positions",
    "actively seeking such partial truths is a worthwhile disposition"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; acknowledges binary cognition while proposing a practical corrective without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "situations involve genuine partial truths on opposing sides and the practice yields improved understanding or reduced harm",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "one side lacks meaningful truth (e.g., demonstrable falsehoods) yet the principle is invoked to create false equivalence"
}
